questions.question: This actress and former Playmate of the Year has had numerous hosting roles for MTV and "The View" and has starred in her own sitcoms.
This rapper gained fame after being featured on Dr. Dre's "The Chronic."
Which actress plays the lead role in "Bridget Jones's Diary" and its sequels?
What former US president was awarded the Nobel Peace Prize in 2002?
After achieving early success in stand-up comedy, this star appeared in his own sitcom from 1995 to 2004 and later became the host of the game show "The Price Is Right."
